title: agrostis vinealis subsp. planifolia
intro: Agrostis vinealis subsp. planifolia, also known as bent grass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Agrostis vinealis subsp. planifolia include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its purported health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
